violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean inside line coolers.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean fronts and sides of kitchen equipment. -Clean shelving in kitchen. -Clean fan covers in walk in cooler.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Clean surround on venthood above flat top.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors and ceilings need cleaned in kitchen.
